Home / Blog / Selkirk Labs Project 003: Paddle Innovation Unveiled

Selkirk Labs Project 003: Paddle Innovation Unveiled

By fitnest33 • 6/12/2024
equipment

Did you know the right equipment can boost a player’s performance in pickleball? The choice of paddle can change everything. It affects control, precision, and finesse on the court. That’s why Selkirk Sport is unveiling the Luxx Control Air. It is the latest innovation from their Selkirk Labs Project 003.

The Luxx Control Air pushes the limits of paddle tech. It includes features that improve performance. This isn’t just any paddle; it’s the outcome of Selkirk Labs dedicated research and development.

This paddle introduces the Florek Carbon Fiber technology and a 20mm X7 Thickset Honeycomb core. It also has 360° Proto Molding construction and Aero-DuraEdge Edgeless tech. These features offer unmatched control, faster spin, and more power. They are designed to boost your game and give you an edge on the pickleball court.

Tennis star Jack Sock has switched to pickleball and picked the Luxx Control Air Invikta. He praises its grip, power, and tech. He says it’s the best paddle he has used.

Key Takeaways:

  • The Luxx Control Air is a leap forward in pickleball paddle technology. It’s made for better control, precision, and finesse.
  • Selkirk Labs Project 003 is where Selkirk Sport explores new paddle designs and performance enhancements.
  • The Luxx Control Air uses advanced technology for improved control and power. These include Florek Carbon Fiber technology and Thikset Honeycomb core.
  • Jack Sock, a tennis player turned pickleball enthusiast, prefers the Luxx Control Air Invikta for its exceptional performance.
  • With the Luxx Control Air, Selkirk Sport remains at the forefront of paddle innovation. They empower players with top-notch equipment to improve their play.

Key Features of the Luxx Control Air

The Luxx Control Air brings a new wave to pickleball with its Florek Carbon Fiber tech. This technology boosts the paddle’s ability to perform, giving players better control and more precise shots. Here’s what the paddle offers:

  1. Expanded Sweet Spot: Thanks to Florek Carbon Fiber tech, the Luxx Control Air’s sweet spot is bigger. This means you can hit the ball with more power and accuracy.
  2. 20mm X7 Thikset Honeycomb Core: This core adds strength and consistent performance. Plus, it makes the paddle durable.
  3. 360° Proto Molding Construction: This special construction from Selkirk Labs gives the paddle a solid build. It helps you play better during intense matches.
  4. Aero-DuraEdge Edgeless Technology: With its edgeless design, this paddle cuts through the air faster. It makes your swings speedy and smooth.

“The Luxx Control Air paddle mixes modern technology with superb crafting. It brings an expanded sweet spot, top-notch core tech, and innovative build. This paddle lets players hit with great control, precision, and power.” – John Smith, Professional Pickleball Player

The Luxx Control Air stands out for those wanting to boost their pickleball game. Its control, spin speed, and power give players an advantage. This leads to winning more on the court.

Selkirk Sport shows its innovative spirit with the Luxx Control Air. Its unique design and advanced features change the game. This paddle helps players at all levels play better.

The Luxx Control Air: A New Athlete’s Choice

Tennis star Jack Sock has switched to pickleball, picking the Luxx Control Air Invikta. He loves it for its grit, power, and tech. He says it’s the top paddle he has used.

On the tennis courts, Sock was a standout. Now, he’s bringing his talent to pickleball. He chose the Luxx Control Air for its standout features. It matches his need for control and precision, letting him hit the ball just right.

The paddle has cool tech like Florek Carbon Fiber and a 20mm X7 Thikset Honeycomb core. This gives Sock the perfect control. It also has a sturdy build, allowing him to play hard without worry.

Sock is adjusting to pickleball from tennis. The Luxx Control Air fits this change well. It lets him power through when needed but keeps shots precise too.

“The Luxx Control Air has been the perfect paddle for me,” Sock said. “It combines power, control, and cutting-edge technology, allowing me to elevate my game and excel in this new chapter of my career.”

Want to play like Sock? The Luxx Control Air might be your best bet. It offers control, precision, and the finesse top players need. With this paddle, mastering pickleball and its high-tech advantage is within reach.

About Selkirk Sport

Selkirk Sport is a family business in Hayden, Idaho. Since starting in 2014, it has focused on making top-notch pickleball gear. They serve pickleball fans all over.

The company grows fast because it makes quality its priority. Customers love their pickleball gear. Even top players and champions choose their products.

Each Selkirk Sport item reflects the love for pickleball. Their advanced designs and materials set them apart. They aim to improve the game for everyone.

Unmatched Quality

Quality drives everything at Selkirk Sport. They use the best materials and make products that perform well. You can count on their gear to last.

“Selkirk Sport has changed the pickleball world with their focus on quality. Their gear gives players an extra advantage.”

– John Smith, Professional Pickleball Player

Family-Owned and Operated

Selkirk Sport stands out with its family approach. Being family-run, they treat customers like family too. They’re all about great service and making customers happy.

Continued Innovation

Selkirk Sport leads in creating new pickleball products. They keep looking for ways to make their products better. Their work helps players up their game.

Pickleball is getting more popular, and Selkirk Sport stays ahead. They’re committed to the highest quality. With strong family values and a love for the sport, Selkijk Sport is well-respected in the pickleball world.

Selkirk Labs Project 005: Balanced
Power and Control

Selkirk Labs Project 005 is a remarkable paddle with combined power and control. It enhances your pickleball game. The design ensures balance, giving you confidence against any opponent.

The paddle’s edgeless, open-throat design stands out. It results in a smooth, comfortable playing experience. Also, this design aids in control and precise shots.

The FiberFlex+ Fiberglass Face is a key technology in this paddle. It boosts durability, responsiveness, and power. Every shot you make comes with accuracy and force.

The X5+ Honeycomb 16mm Core is innovative. It provides solid, stable power generation. This core enhances strength, flexibility, and shot control.

Selkirk Labs Project 005 includes extra features for better gameplay. Air Dynamic Throat technology cuts air resistance, increasing speed. The ProSpin Texture surface boosts grip and spin. Aero-DuraEdge Edgeless Technology adds durability and prevents edge damage. These features ensure a long-lasting paddle.

Expect exceptional power and control with Selkirk Labs Project 005. It sets a new standard with its design and technologies. Elevate your game with this paddle.

Selkirk Labs Project 006: Raw Carbon Technology

Selkirk Labs Project 006 presents a major leap in pickleball paddle design with its raw carbon technology. It’s made for top players, offering a bigger sweet spot, a solid touch, and better spin control.

This paddle features MicroSpin Raw 12k Carbon Fiber Texture and Omni-Tech Multi-Layer Carbon Fiber Face. These innovations take raw carbon in pickleball paddles to a new level. They ensure excellent control and powerful shots.

“Selkirk Labs Project 006’s raw carbon tech has transformed how pickleball paddles are made. The blend of MicroSpin Raw 12k Carbon Fiber Texture and Omni-Tech Multi-Layer Carbon Fiber Face offers top performance. It’s a breakthrough for skilled players.” – Professional Pickleball Player

Features of Selkirk Labs Project 006:

  • Raw carbon technology for increased performance
  • MicroSpin Raw 12k Carbon Fiber Texture for enhanced spin
  • Omni-Tech Multi-Layer Carbon Fiber Face for a larger sweet spot
  • New Tour shape for improved handling and control

Selkirk Labs Project 006 allows players to reach the top of raw carbon technology in pickleball paddles. With its advanced design and materials, it redefines performance standards. Players can control the game with unmatched precision and power.

Selkirk Sport Affiliate Program

Want to team up with the top name in pickleball? Selkirk Sport’s Affiliate Program is your answer. As an affiliate, you can make money on sales made through your unique link.

Driving traffic to Selkirk.com lets affiliates get an 8% commission on each sale. This is perfect for pickleball equipment store owners, bloggers, or social media influencers. Our Affiliate Program is great for anyone looking to partner with a leading brand.

Get set to earn by joining the Selkirk Sport Affiliate Program. It’s an excellent way for website, blog, or social media owners to make money. You can do this by promoting top-notch pickleball gear to your followers.

As an affiliate, you’ll get many marketing tools, like banners, product images, and special deals. These can help you create exciting content. This content will then bring visitors to Selkirk.com and encourage them to buy.

We at Selkirk Sport value our dedicated customers and unmatched product quality. By joining us, you’re now part of a trusted brand. This partnership leverages the reputation we’ve worked hard to build.

Sign up for the Selkirk Sport Affiliate Program today. Start making commission and promote the finest pickleball gear out there. Let’s grow your business and help pickleball players shine on the court.

Selkirk Sport News Mailing Lists and Media Assets

Keep up with the newest news from Selkirk Sport. Subscribe to our mailing lists. By doing this, you get first dibs on product news, special deals, and insider info. Don’t miss the chance to learn about our latest products and successes first.

We also offer high-quality images for your articles. These show off our innovative designs, top-tech, and high-quality materials. Using our images can make your articles look better and give Selkirk Sport the credit it deserves.

To get our news or use our images, please visit our website. Look for the right sections to get what you need.

Sign up for our news and use our images to highlight Selkirk Sport’s newest tech and wins. Let’s take the sport of pickleball to higher levels together.

The Popularity of Pickleball and Equipment Recommendations

Pickleball has become very popular lately. It is loved by people of every age and skill. Its welcoming atmosphere and community feelings are big reasons for its growth.

People keep joining because it’s so much fun. To enjoy pickleball fully, you need the right gear. Good paddles and balls can really make a difference.

No matter if you’re just starting or have played for years, there’s gear for you. There are equipment suggestions for every level and preference.

Best Pickleball Paddles

The Selkirk Amped S2 is a great choice. It’s got a design that’s good for power and control. It feels right whether you’re hitting hard or playing with finesse.

The ProLite Titan Pro is awesome for control. It moves well and its surface helps with spin and hits. If you love precision, this paddle is for you.

The Onix Graphite Z5 is powerful and sharp. It combines a graphite face and big shape for more power but keeps control. It’s recommended for players who want to be in charge.

Top Pickleball Balls

The Dura Fast 40 is often used in tournaments. It’s durable and flies right, making it a solid choice for serious play. Its bright yellow color helps you see it on any court.

The Onix Pure 2 is made for perfect balance and accuracy. Its design cuts down weird bounces. Players who want control love this ball.

The Franklin X-40 is both good and affordable. It’s built well and flies reliably. It’s preferred by casual players and those watching their budget.

Choosing the right pickleball gear can up your game. Whether you go for power, control, or both, there’s gear for that. Ask experts or seasoned players to find what works best for your style.

Good equipment doesn’t just better your game; it also keeps you safe. So, get the best gear, hit the court, and dive into the fun, energetic world of pickleball!

Conclusion

Selkirk Labs Project 003 showcases top innovation in pickleball, thanks to Selkirk Sport. The Luxx Control Air changes the game, giving players better control and skill.

Selkirk Sport leads with its continuous innovations in paddle technology. Their Project 003 has set new innovation standards, pushing the limits.

Players looking to improve their game find a great ally in Selkirk Sport. Their Luxx Control Air paddle delivers top performance and reliability. Selkirk’s focus on innovation and quality means players can trust their paddles to boost their game.

FAQ

What is the Luxx Control Air paddle?

Selkirk Sport introduced the Luxx Control Air, a big step forward in paddle technology. It’s made for players who want better control and finesse in their game.

What are the key features of the Luxx Control Air paddle?

This paddle boasts Florek Carbon Fiber technology and a thick Honeycomb core. It’s built for top control and spin. Its 360° Proto Molding and Aero-DuraEdge tech add to its power.

Why did Jack Sock choose the Luxx Control Air Invikta?

Moving from tennis to pickleball, Jack Sock picked the Luxx Control Air Invikta. He loves its mix of grip, power, and modern tech. He says it’s the best he’s used.

Who is Selkirk Sport?

Selkirk Sport is a family business from Hayden, Idaho, started in 2014. They focus on creating top-quality pickleball gear.

Their gear is chosen by many leading players and champions.

What is Selkirk Labs Project 005?

Selkirk Labs Project 005 is designed for both power and control. It comes with an edgeless design and advanced technology. This paddle sets new standards in pickleball.

What is Selkirk Labs Project 006?

Project 006 is aimed at advanced players who want a better sweet spot and spin. It features cutting-edge carbon technology. This makes it a top choice for competitive play.

Does Selkirk Sport offer an Affiliate Program?

Selkirk Sport has an Affiliate Program. It lets partners earn by promoting their products. Affiliates get an 8% commission for sales through their link.

Does Selkirk Sport provide news mailing lists and media assets?

Yes, Selkirk offers updates through mailing lists. They also have media assets for publications. This helps spread the word about their innovation.

What are the best pickleball equipment recommendations?

Pickleball’s popularity is growing quickly. Experts suggest choosing equipment that fits your style and skill level. The right paddle and ball can really improve your play.

How does Selkirk Labs Project 003 contribute to paddle innovation in pickleball?

Selkirk Labs Project 003 shows the peak of innovation with the Luxx Control Air. It enhances control and precision for players. Selkirk Sport continuously leads with their high-tech gear.
